title: Boat Rental in Lake Powell 2026 Guide: Best Charters & Prices
html:
Lake Powell, a sprawling reservoir on the Colorado River, offers some of the most dramatic boating scenery in the American Southwest. Renting a boat from Wahweap Marina can cost from USD 350 for a half-day powerboat to USD 2,500 for a crewed houseboat. BoatHire24 connects you with verified charter operators for a seamless booking experience.

Where to set off in Lake Powell

Launch points around Lake Powell are well-equipped and scenic. Wahweap Marina near Page, Arizona, is the largest, offering full services including fueling and provisioning. Bullfrog Marina on the Utah shore provides access to the northern canyons. Halls Crossing Marina is a quieter alternative, while Antelope Point Marina sits close to the famous Antelope Canyon. Lone Rock Beach offers primitive launch options for smaller craft. Each location gives you a different starting point for exploring the lake’s 2,000 miles of shoreline.

Which boat to rent

Choosing the right vessel depends on your group size and how you want to spend your day. The Prestige 500 is an excellent choice for a luxury day trip: this motor yacht combines comfort with performance and can be chartered from USD 1,200 per day.

  1. Houseboat, ideal for multi-day family holidays; sleeps up to 12 guests; from USD 3,500 per weekend.
  2. Deck boat, perfect for watersports and sunbathing; holds up to 10 passengers; from USD 450 half-day.
  3. Pontoon boat, stable and spacious for groups and fishing; up to 12 guests; from USD 300 half-day.
  4. Wakeboard boat, purpose-built for towing; seats up to 8; from USD 550 half-day.

How much does it cost to rent a boat in Lake Powell?

Boat rental prices in Lake Powell vary widely, from USD 100 per person for a shared tour to USD 5,000 per day for a luxury crewed yacht. The table below outlines typical charter costs for 2026.

  • Shared canyon tour: USD 100, 150 per person, 2, 3 hours.
  • Small motorboat half-day (4 hours): USD 350, 600.
  • Catamaran full-day (8 hours): USD 1,000, 1,800.
  • Crewed motor yacht (full day, up to 12 guests): USD 2,500, 5,000.

For the best availability, browse boats for your dates early, especially during peak season. Fuel and taxes are additional, typically adding 10, 20 per cent to the base rental.

Do you need a licence to rent a boat in Lake Powell?

No licence is required in Arizona or Utah for most rental boats, but a short safety briefing is mandatory. Operators will confirm exact requirements and may insist on a valid driving licence. A typical trip can cover up to 30 nautical miles from Glen Canyon Dam to Padre Bay. The high season runs from May through September, when the wind can pick up from the southwest, creating choppy conditions on open water.

If you plan to explore the narrow canyons, hire a local skipper for the first day; the submerged rock hazards are not all charted and a guide can save you costly damage.

At a glance

  • Price band: USD 100 (per person), USD 5,000 (full-day crewed yacht)
  • Peak months: June, July and August
  • Trip length: 2 hours to multi-day
  • Capacity: 1, 12 guests typical
  • Currency: USD
  • Licence: None for most rentals

Questions about boat rental in Lake Powell

Can I rent a boat for a day without a boating licence?

Yes, most operators in Lake Powell allow day rentals without a formal boating licence after a brief orientation.

What is the best month to rent a boat in Lake Powell?

June and July offer warm weather and calm mornings, though August can bring afternoon thunderstorms.

Are pets allowed on charter boats?

Some operators allow well-behaved dogs on board, but always confirm in advance when booking.

Can I anchor overnight anywhere on the lake?

Overnight mooring is permitted in designated areas; check with the marina for permits and fees.

Whether you are a first-time visitor or a seasoned boater, Lake Powell rewards careful planning. BoatHire24 is a worldwide marketplace where you can rent a boat in Lake Powell or list your own. To discover the full range of boats available for 2026, browse the listings. If you own a charter vessel, consider listing it to reach thousands of travellers.

Written by the BoatHire24 team, who book and list verified boats in Lake Powell and hundreds of destinations worldwide.
